title: crotalaria sphaerocarpa subsp. sphaerocarpa
intro: Crotalaria sphaerocarpa subsp. sphaerocarpa, also known as the Australian rattle pod, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant are derived from its seeds and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Crotalaria sphaerocarpa subsp. sphaerocarpa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and skin infections. Crotalaria sphaerocarpa subsp. sphaerocarpa can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and effectiveness.
